items.name: Running Shoes (Multiple Pairs)
items.description: High-quality road running shoes, broken in
items.whyNeeded: You will run hundreds of miles during BUD/S. Shoe quality directly prevents stress fractures.
items.selectionTips: Rotate 3+ pairs to let them dry. Many candidates prefer HOKA ONE ONE or Brooks for cushion.

recommendedProducts.name: HOKA Clifton 9 Running Shoe
recommendedProducts.reason: Maximum cushioning protects joints during the 600+ miles of running in BUD/S. Multiple SEAL instructors recommend HOKA specifically for reducing stress fracture risk.

items.name: Wetsuit (3mm)
items.description: Full-body wetsuit for cold water training
items.whyNeeded: Cold water immersion is constant. Hypothermia is a leading reason candidates quit.
items.selectionTips: Fit is critical — too loose and it's useless, too tight and you'll exhaust yourself. Try on before purchasing.

items.name: Swim Fins
items.whyNeeded: Required for ocean swims and hydrographic reconnaissance. Speed and efficiency matter.
items.selectionTips: Churchill Makapuu fins are the SEAL standard. Break them in before the course.

items.name: Dive Mask and Snorkel
items.description: Low-volume dive mask with clear silicone
items.whyNeeded: Required for underwater operations and pool evolutions.
items.selectionTips: Bring a backup. Masks get kicked off or fogged beyond use.

items.name: Knee and Ankle Sleeves
items.whyNeeded: Joint injuries are extremely common. Prevention is the only strategy.
items.selectionTips: Learn to tape your own knees and ankles. Do it before every evolution.

items.name: Quality Socks (High Volume)
items.whyNeeded: You will be wet constantly. Trench foot and blisters can end your BUD/S career.
items.selectionTips: Darn Tough or Smartwool. Bring at least 14 pairs. Change socks every evolution if possible.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Tactical Micro Crew
recommendedProducts.reason: Merino wool retains warmth even when completely soaked — critical when you're in the Pacific Ocean multiple times per day throughout BUD/S.

items.name: Leukotape and Foot Care
items.description: Athletic tape and blister prevention supplies
items.whyNeeded: Blisters will form. How you manage them determines if you continue.
items.selectionTips: Leukotape over moleskin. Apply before blisters form. Bring Vaseline for toes.

items.name: Mental Toughness Books
items.selectionTips: Read 'Can't Hurt Me' by David Goggins and 'The Warrior Elite' by Dick Couch. BUD/S is 90% mental.

items.name: Electrolyte Supplements
items.selectionTips: Critical during Hell Week and high-heat evolutions. Don't skip these.

recommendedProducts.name: Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier
recommendedProducts.reason: BUD/S candidates lose dangerous amounts of electrolytes. One packet prevents the muscle cramps that force candidates to quit during Hell Week.

items.name: Cold Water Swim Training (Pre-BUD/S)
items.selectionTips: Start cold water immersion 3-6 months before reporting. This is the single best way to prepare.

items.name: Unauthorized Electronics in Training
items.description: Personal phones, watches, GPS in training areas
items.notes: OPSEC. Will be confiscated and you may be dropped.

items.name: Performance-Enhancing Drugs
items.notes: Random drug testing occurs throughout. Immediately disqualifying.
